name: atticus-forge-app
description: Arch-native Forge control app forged from Claude-Code/OpenClaw-style engine patterns

scripts.build:native: mkdir -p build && gcc src/native/forge-gtk.c -o build/forge-gtk $(pkg-config --cflags --libs gtk4)
scripts.install:desktop: npm run build:native && install -Dm755 build/forge-gtk ~/.local/bin/atticus-forge && install -Dm644 local.atticus.forge.desktop ~/.local/share/applications/local.atticus.forge.desktop
